notes:
The Oki C301dn is a networked color laser printer with a 2012 street price of $400 USD. This printer is supported by the foo2hiperc open software printer driver.

Consumables: Separate toner cartridges black (2200 prints, ~$32), yellow/magenta/cyan (1500 prints, ~$65 each), transfer belt (60000 prints, ~$78), fuser unit (60000 prints, ~$78), image drum (30000/20000 prints, ~$160)

drivers.name: foo2hiperc
drivers.comments:
This driver is available in the Ghostscript Printer Application

This is a driver developed for the Oki Data Color Laser Printers C301dn, C310dn, C3200, C3300, C3400, C5100, C5200, C56xx and C5800.

PPD files (and the Foomatic XML files to generate them) come with the driver, therefore we do not supply PPDs here on the OpenPrinting site.
